description: API性能深度分析 - 包含下钻功能

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (1 - countIf(response_status_class = '5xx') / count()) * 100 as success_rate FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code)

SELECT countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) * 100.0 / count(*) as slow_rate FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code)

SELECT quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) as p95_response_time FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code)

SELECT count(DISTINCT request_uri_normalized) as unique_apis FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code)

SELECT request_uri_normalized as `API接口`, api_category as `API类别`, count() as `总请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) as `慢请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) * 100.0 / count() as `慢请求比例(%)`, avg(total_request_duration) as `平均响应时间(ms)`, quantile(0.50)(total_request_duration) as `P50响应时间(ms)`, quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) as `P95响应时间(ms)`, quantile(0.99)(total_request_duration) as `P99响应时间(ms)`, countIf(response_status_code >= '400') as `错误数`, countIf(response_status_code >= '400') * 100.0 / count() as `错误率(%)` ,quantile(0.95)(response_body_size_kb) as `P95响应大小(KB)`,countIf(response_body_size_kb > 10240) as `超大响应数(>10MB)`,countIf(response_body_size_kb > 10240) * 100.0 / count() as `超大响应比例(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) GROUP BY request_uri_normalized, api_category HAVING countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) > 0 ORDER BY countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT platform as `平台`, api_category as `API类别`, count() as `请求数`, avg(total_request_duration) as `平均响应时间(ms)`, quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) as `P95响应时间(ms)`, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) as `慢请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) * 100.0 / count() as `慢请求比例(%)`, countIf(response_status_code >= '400') * 100.0 / count() as `错误率(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) GROUP BY platform, api_category ORDER BY avg(total_request_duration) DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT api_category as `API类别`, count() as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration <= 0.1) as `极快(<100ms)`, countIf(total_request_duration > 0.1 AND total_request_duration <= 0.5) as `快速(100-500ms)`, countIf(total_request_duration > 0.5 AND total_request_duration <= 1) as `正常(500ms-1s)`, countIf(total_request_duration > 1 AND total_request_duration <= 3) as `慢速(1-3s)`, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) as `极慢(>3s)`, avg(total_request_duration) as `平均响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) GROUP BY api_category ORDER BY avg(total_request_duration) DESC

SELECT $__timeInterval(log_time) as time, api_category, avg(total_request_duration) as response_time FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) GROUP BY time, api_category ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(log_time) as time, platform, countIf(total_request_duration > 3000) as slow_requests FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) GROUP BY time, platform ORDER BY time

SELECT request_uri_normalized as `API接口`, api_category as `API类别`, any(platform) as `主要平台`, count() as `总请求数`, countIf(response_status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')) as `错误数`, countIf(response_status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')) * 100.0 / count() as `错误率(%)`, countIf(response_status_code = '404') as `404错误`, countIf(response_status_code = '500') as `500错误`, countIf(response_status_code = '502') as `502错误`, countIf(response_status_code = '503') as `503错误`, avg(total_request_duration) as `平均响应时间(ms)`, arrayStringConcat(arrayDistinct(groupArray(if(response_status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx'), response_status_code, ''))), ', ') as `错误状态码` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_criticality IN (${business_criticality:singlequote}), $business_criticality)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(device_type IN (${device_type:singlequote}), $device_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(api_name IN (${api_name:singlequote}), $api_name)
    AND $__conditionalAll(os_type IN (${os_type:singlequote}), $os_type)
    AND $__conditionalAll(response_status_code IN (${status_code:singlequote}), $status_code) 
    GROUP BY request_uri_normalized, api_category 
    HAVING countIf(response_status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')) > 0 
    ORDER BY countIf(response_status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')) DESC 
    LIMIT 20

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT business_unit FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_unit IS NOT NULL AND business_unit != ''
list.label: 业务系统
list.name: business_unit
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT business_unit FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_unit IS NOT NULL AND business_unit != ''

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE environment IS NOT NULL AND environment != '' AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
list.label: 环境
list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE environment IS NOT NULL AND environment != '' AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT business_domain FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_domain IS NOT NULL AND business_domain != 'unknown'
list.label: 业务域
list.name: business_domain
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT business_domain FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_domain IS NOT NULL AND business_domain != 'unknown'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT business_criticality FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_criticality IS NOT NULL AND business_criticality != 'unknown'
list.label: 业务优先级
list.name: business_criticality
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT business_criticality FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_criticality IS NOT NULL AND business_criticality != 'unknown'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT platform_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE platform_type IS NOT NULL AND platform_type != 'unknown'
list.label: 平台类型
list.name: platform_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT platform_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE platform_type IS NOT NULL AND platform_type != 'unknown'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT device_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL AND device_type != 'unknown'
list.label: 设备类型
list.name: device_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL AND device_type != 'unknown'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT api_name FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE api_name IS NOT NULL AND api_name != 'unknown' AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
list.label: API名称
list.name: api_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT api_name FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE api_name IS NOT NULL AND api_name != 'unknown' AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT os_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE os_type != 'unknown'
list.label: 操作系统
list.name: os_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT os_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE os_type != 'unknown'

title: API性能深度分析
